##RRUFFID=R080044

##LOCALITY=Aquarius Range, Mohave County, Arizona, USA
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=John Weber
##DESCRIPTION=Dark brown fragment from metamict sample R060418, after heating at T = 850 C for 18 hours
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed only by X-ray diffraction

##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Powder

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
